title: Raw UGC Side-Eye Reaction
description: A raw selfie video of a young Turkish girl giving a skeptical side-eye reaction while listening to someone off-camera.

prompt.concept: Raw selfie video of a Turkish girl in her early 20s. Someone (off-camera, like her friend or boyfriend) just said something sus and she gives them THE side-eye while her phone is rolling. Caught in the moment. Pure raw UGC — feels like a Snapchat clip her friend would send back to roast her.

character.hair: dark chestnut brown hair, half-up half-down with a claw clip, some flyaways, looks like she fixed it once and gave up
character.skin: warm light olive skin, real texture, slight oiliness on forehead, faded eyebrow gel showing real brow hairs, no foundation, just lip balm and maybe leftover under-eye concealer
character.eyes: hazel-brown, light traces of yesterday's eyeliner smudged, not freshly made up
character.expression: skeptical sideways look, one brow up, small disbelieving smirk, like 'are you serious right now'

wardrobe.top: oversized warm camel sweatshirt or worn-in tee, slightly stretched neckline, no logo
wardrobe.nails: wine red polish but slightly chipped on at least one nail

setting.location: her room or a friend's couch, low-effort setting
details: blanket bunched up next to her
phone charger or earphones visible somewhere
wall slightly visible with a print or random sticker
warm bedside or floor lamp lighting, dim

camera.angle: phone held in one hand, slight tilt to one side
camera.lens_feel: iPhone front camera, 1x, real selfie distortion
camera.movement: noticeable handheld micro-shake, like she's holding it casually

lighting.key: warm dim apartment light, uneven on her face

image_quality.color: ungraded, warm yellow cast from lamp

prompt.micro_idle_before_reaction: 0.0-0.6s casually looking at camera with a small neutral 'mhm' face, like she's listening to someone talk

action_timeline.beat: Casual neutral face, looking semi-at the camera, slight head nod like she's listening to someone talk off-screen
Eyes snap sharply to the side without head moving much, one eyebrow lifts in skeptical arch, mouth pulls into a closed-lip smirk on one side
Holds side-eye, blinks slowly once, smirk twitches, says quietly under breath 'hmmm' or 'cidden mi?' or just an exhaled laugh
Eyes drift back toward camera but with the smirk still locked in, eyebrow stays up, gives a tiny 'I don't believe you' head shake. Holds the receipts-energy.

gesture_rules.movement_style: Eye-driven and slow-burn. The face is doing 90% of the work, the head barely moves.
realism_ticks: real smirk twitch on one side

no_text_no_graphics.note: Raw selfie clip only. No overlays, no UI, no text, no logos.
